textByHash.0537bc309fe99fdf30e2ba846137c02e8091b7cd: Arr, I've still not seen any of my crew.
textByHash.0c5d704b699f8c39b4e6925ff9fa6d2968932d50: I can tell by the cut of your jib that you've read the Teleport anchoring scroll, and ye've opened our lockers some times.
textByHash.12a59f87d28c1a8d3fd3632ff8702249dedf08eb: Ye've done it once, and once only.
textByHash.179c297e36e2bc6269b4d9fb88147820761faf75: Ye'll need a key for that, matey! One of the crew should 'ave one.
textByHash.17f433ebc8a9dc8c7a616dc9aab59609e1cb6fe0: They best do! That scurvy lot keep fillin' their lockers with loot and sneakin' off without swappin' places!
textByHash.227d22c8b74ceb7b1c6a37921fae60025597909e: They're searchin' for booty at that temple to the west.
textByHash.4747e4de7abd1ca11cc4fb611432a50d646ea39a: Aye, I can tell by the cut of your jib that you've read the Teleport anchoring scroll.
textByHash.481a29ab7e1d6ebb3986c7f81a752c6cf986490d: I can tell by the cut of your jib that you've read the Teleport anchoring scroll, but ye've never opened our lockers.
textByHash.483110e73997a37710d90b7bbef63c42b3463c40: Naw, they're too busy fightin' to talk to the likes of ye. Besides, we stash all our spare scrolls in these lockers for safekeepin'.
textByHash.4b0f6d68ea0d2476ff76998a5367575567f19a8e: Now we've run aground, as ye can see.
textByHash.74a407e74ca24465ff7b8ca02d0e4525b1edba62: There be plenty o' loot in them lockers, matey. Don't expect to find a scroll right away.
textByHash.785d211ecdfed404305827bd3e1789c3f68609b1: Nothin' we can't handle! We've a way of stoppin' their tricksy teleports.
textByHash.7ba097ec73845663999d8808ec7d69928e52ca78: Ye've never done it even once!
textByHash.7cec4d353572976c8409cd39d7892b05521237aa: I can tell by the cut of your jib that ye haven't yet read the Teleport anchoring scroll, though ye've opened our lockers some times.
textByHash.900efe9cad9e2cbf5bee8f291393427c2ef548ee: I'm here to guard this ship from any scurvy dogs darin' to loot her cargo.
textByHash.9881332b1e25befb02a9700d8efa06ce36df1f8e: They wrote us down a spell on some magic scrolls. All we 'ave to do is read one, and then we're properly anchored! Those mages can't teleport us anywhere!
textByHash.a867164c552374935c01a611cce61c5f02da8526: Me hearties and I were enjoying a bit o' grog when we espied a group of landlubbers fightin' on the shore. 'Twas such an exciting battle that our navigator forgot to watch for the rocks.
textByHash.a95747b6b5450bf3374712b1d6b3c71b6b4536ed: I've not seen any of my crew yet.
textByHash.baace637d8857b85df281633e574020deb42c9d4: I can tell by the cut of your jib that ye haven't yet read the Teleport anchoring scroll, and ye've opened our lockers once, and once only.
textByHash.be2b665f8562467c9aeaa66ef1a2bf657e4546b3: And when ye see 'em, tell 'em it's their turn to keep watch!
textByHash.c4332a44fee937e56775f1ee4967f64ae09e4bd7: I can tell by the cut of your jib that ye haven't yet read the Teleport anchoring scroll, and ye've never opened our lockers.
textByHash.c67bfc66e3ea56d241fc90294f61cace21438fbc: What we lack in brains, we make up for in gold! We found us a landlubber willin' to share their knowledge... for a price.
textByHash.c6de76fa6b1bebeb69638b8de3dddb36d4d2e4ca: I can tell by the cut of your jib that you've read the Teleport anchoring scroll, and ye've opened our lockers once, and once only.
textByHash.e54c529cc294b1690e1cc5eaed6554d0b0cf2765: Aye, I can tell by the cut of your jib that ye haven't yet read the Teleport anchoring scroll.
